description: Roster / table row: identity, display, and a dedicated stable sort key.

canonical_key.description: Stable slug for URLs and APIs; maps from persistence `url_key`.

display_name.description: Human-facing name (may change without breaking URLs if `canonical_key` stays fixed).

sort_key.description: Sort by ascending UTF-8 `sort_key` for deterministic UI lists. For valid agents equals `canonical_key`.

title: AgentListItem
